description_long: This obelisk is a vertically oriented, monolithic stone structure with a rectangular cross-section and rounded, bulging corners at the top. The front face features a recessed niche with two protruding elements and what appear to be carved reliefs or symbols above the niche, possibly of cultural or historical significance. The sides are decorated with vertical grooves and additional relief carvings, including circular and linear motifs. The rear face is less ornate but still displays some incised patterns and a diagonal groove. The entire surface has a rough, weathered texture, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The obelisk stands on a simple, rectangular plinth that elevates it slightly above ground level.
description: A weathered, stone obelisk with carved reliefs, a recessed niche, and a rectangular plinth base. The surface is rough and features decorative motifs on multiple sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows a recessed niche with two protruding elements and relief carvings above, framed by rounded corners.
description_view_1: Side view reveals vertical grooves and a circular motif, with the rounded top and rectangular base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a diagonal groove and minimal ornamentation, with the rough stone texture prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features vertical grooves and a circular relief, similar to the other side, with the plinth base visible.
attribute_inscription: There are carved reliefs and symbols on the front and sides, but no legible text or inscriptions are visible.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative reliefs and motifs are present on the front and sides, including a recessed niche, protruding elements, circular and linear carvings, and rounded top corners.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, rectangular plinth made of the same stone material, with a flat top and no visible decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded and bulging, with carved reliefs and a weathered, rough finish, lacking any pointed or sharp features.
